title: Powers via crystal
description: this mod allows you to gain special powers via a crystal
body:
This mod adds in a crystal that gives you powers its really as simple as that
for now the powers are teleportation, lightning strike, explosion, knockback, fiery explosion. there are also some general passive enhancements
this mod is for those who want to just be more powerful more easierly or for those who want to become "all powerful" without having to manually use commands
more powers might be added in future versions if I get reccomendations on my discord
